problem: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost?
hypothesis: Quantum annealing for optimization problems may resolve Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Hardware prototype with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
